skill_availability_goal: Verify release_verified through general-path tag-commit content binding when commit and tree differ from the recorded post-stamp HEAD.
prompt: 执行 fixture 中定义的 post-tag audit。读取已有 pre-tag 审计记录并解析实际 `v1.2.0` tag commit；快路径不成立时，在 tag commit 处逐项重算受影响页面和版本面内容哈希，与记录比较。只做最终复核，不重新生成内容或盖章。
